summary: FQA-001 (CRLF line endings) is resolved. No regressions found. Block renders identically to pre-fix screenshots.

lint.detail: No errors in blocks/LinkWithDetails/LinkWithDetails.tsx or blocks/LinkWithDetails/index.tsx. The 80 Delete \r violations from Prettier are gone. The 2 lint errors reported are in unrelated files (DemoContainer.tsx: 'cn' unused; Header.tsx: missing curly brace) — pre-existing issues not caused by this fix and out of scope for this block's QA.

build.detail: TypeScript compilation passes. No type errors.

sync.detail: All 8 TSX/PHP sync checks continue to pass.

registration.detail: block.json registration valid. All sub-checks pass.

visualRegression.detail: Desktop screenshot at 1440px (chromium) is visually identical to pre-fix baseline. All 11 block instances render correctly. Consecutive block border separator, empty description, and all demo-container variations unchanged.

outstandingIssues.description: ThemeButton.php outputs btn-tertiary anchor class with leading newline and trailing tab whitespace. Pre-existing; not addressed by this fix. Out of scope for LinkWithDetails.

recommendation: LinkWithDetails block is clear to proceed. FQA-001 is resolved. FQA-002 remains open but is a ThemeButton-level issue, not a LinkWithDetails regression.
